All dtypes x fidelity x fp32_acc pass on randn. HiFi4 PCC ~0.99998, HiFi2 ~0.99996, LoFi worst ~0.9989. config knob modulates precision as expected.
6 float32 failures: 4x D=1024 (program.cpp:1487 throw, suspect L1 OOM from fp32 CBs), 2x S=8192 no-mask (precision rms=0.0206>0.02). bf16+bf8b all green incl 8192.

D=1024 float32 OOMs because fp32 input CBs (cb_q/k/v) are 2x bf16 footprint; cb_k=cb_v=2*kv_chunk_t*Dt*4096 bytes at Dt=32 ~= 1MB each, blows 1.5MB L1. bf16 same shape fits (was in Phase-0 140). Need to confirm error is L1 alloc.

LEVER PROVEN: temp KV_CHUNK_MAX=1 -> all 4 D=1024 fp32 OOM golden cases PASS (run+correct). Confirms kv-chunk reduction shrinks cb_k/cb_v to fit L1. Probe reverted to keep R1 numeric-formats scope clean; deferring robust footprint-aware reduction to /memory-budget-metal follow-up.

description: Find production SDPA padding mask handling

note: both op probes pass at PCC0.99 but S_kv=47 passing is likely loose-threshold luck; denominator over-counts padded keys

observation: from_torch TILE_LAYOUT zero-pads padded region: w_non_aligned (D=47) PCC>0.99 with no masking confirms padded D-cols of Q/K/V are zero (QKT and PV correct). h+S_kv=47 PCC>0.99 but suspect inflated softmax denominator -> need -inf key-pad mask for RMS.

detail: 96 failed / 24 passed. ALL failures have S_kv non-aligned. no-mask: pcc~0.999 rms~0.19 (severity=precision, inflated denom scales output down). causal: pcc~0.86 rms~0.6 (severity=bug). 24 pass = S_kv-aligned (Q..32x50 Skv=32, Q..64x47 Skv=64) -> ceil-div + D/Sq zero-pad correct. Need -inf key-pad mask.

fix: Added cb_pad_mask: reader fills a -inf vertical column tile (cols>=S_kv%32) once per unit; compute binary_adds it to cb_scores on the last KV block before softmax reduce.

detail: 120/120 passed (was 24/120). All S_kv-non-aligned cases fixed by the -inf key-padding mask. No hang under --dev.
